description: baseline: MDN+GitHub 30q, recall=0.80, MRR=0.48
BM25+vec top_k=100: no gain, slight MRR drop
bm25_weight=3.0: recall 0.83->0.87
bm25_weight=5.0: recall regression 0.87->0.83
path boost 0.40: regression, overboosts path-matching files
file-level chunk aggregation +0.005/extra chunk: recall 0.87->0.90
file agg 0.01: MRR 0.62->0.66
RRF k=10: slight MRR improvement
NEAR 8: regression, too loose proximity
headroom 20x/10x: no change
BM25+vec top_k=100: marginal, 3 misses unchanged
YAML title extraction: fixes 1 miss but regresses another, net negative
strip frontmatter + YAML title: recall regression, lost 3K chunks
vec_weight=1.5: no change
bm25=3.0+file_agg=0.02: MRR up but recall down, net loss
chunk_idx=0 boost: recall regression
path depth penalty: penalizes deep MDN paths too much
vec distance bonus 0.15: recall regression 0.90->0.83, vec noise overweights BM25
bm25_weight=3.0 with file_agg+path_reranker: recall regression 0.90->0.87
query term coverage re-ranker 0.10: MRR 0.66->0.70, breaks plateau
coverage boost 0.15: MRR 0.70->0.70, marginal improvement
coverage boost 0.20: recall regression 0.90->0.87, too aggressive
prefix matching in path re-ranker: MRR 0.70->0.71
file-level coverage union: MRR 0.71->0.71 marginal gain
title match boost 0.15: MRR 0.71->0.72
title boost 0.20: MRR 0.72->0.73
title boost 0.25: no change, 0.20 is sweet spot
bigram proximity boost 0.10: no change, exact bigrams too strict
overlap bonus 0.03: no change, most top results already in both lists
heading match boost 0.10: no change
vec_weight=1.5 with re-rankers: MRR slight regression
fusion 15x dedup 8x headroom: MRR 0.7333->0.7361
fusion 20x dedup 10x: no additional improvement over 15x/8x
length-weighted coverage: regression, overweights long generic terms
common prefix >=5: false positive matches cause regression
BM25 focused AND clause (top 3 longest terms): recall 0.90->0.97, MRR 0.74->0.77, MASSIVE improvement
AND with top 4 terms: too restrictive, recall drops back to 0.90
path boost 0.30: marginal MRR improvement
title boost 0.25: recall regression 0.97->0.93
NEAR top-4 term pairs: massive regression, too much noise from non-adjacent proximity
coverage boost 0.20: no change
BM25+vec top_k=100: MRR regression, more noise from expanded pool
file agg 0.02: MRR regression, overboosts long files
AND with top 2 terms: too broad, recall+MRR regression
sliding window AND clauses: recall+MRR regression, too much BM25 noise
filter BM25 tokens >2 chars: same quality, faster query (31ms->29ms)
